dublinCore.dc:title: 117 HRES 475 EH: Electing a certain Member to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: In the House of Representatives, U. S.,
form.official-title: Electing a certain Member to certain standing committees of the House of Representatives.

section.text: That the following named Member be, and is hereby, elected to the following standing committees of the House of Representatives:

committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Stansbury, to rank immediately after Ms. Leger Fernández.

committee-appointment-paragraph.header: Committee on Science, Space, and Technology:
committee-appointment-paragraph.text: Ms. Stansbury, to rank immediately after Mr. Bowman.
